texto: Look for the heart of a tradition in the actions of its humble servants and selfless teachers. Listen and let the teachings be borne out, or set aside, based on your experience.
explicacao: Citação de Andrew Furst sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Look for the heart of a tradition in the actions of its humble servants and selfless teachers. Li…” articula reflexao, buddhism, heart em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: When we sit in meditation, we are closer than usual to the world as it is. By simply bringing body, breath, and mind together in the present moment, we touch Buddha; we touch reality, and we are in the world as it is. Most people’s experience in this state is peaceful and rejuvenating.
explicacao: Citação de Andrew Furst sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “When we sit in meditation, we are closer than usual to the world as it is. By simply bringing bod…” articula tempo, buddhism, meditation em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como meditation e paz.

frase_original: When we sit in meditation, we are closer than usual to the world as it is. By simply bringing body, breath, and mind together in the present moment, we touch Buddha; we touch reality, and we are in the world as it is. Most people’s experience in this state is peaceful and rejuvenating.

texto: Separating the God question from Buddhism does not make Buddhists atheists—within silence lies mystery. That doesn’t mean, however, we should infer from this acknowledgement of the mystery a nod one way or another on the matter of the divine.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Andrew Furst sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. A afirmação “Separating the God question from Buddhism does not make Buddhists atheists—within silence lies my…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, atheis, buddhism, útil em momentos de reflexao-noturna e buddhism.
